title: Smoky Energizing Jamaican Mushrooms Braise
description: A smoky, cheese-pull Jamaican dish featuring mushrooms, braise, and a boost of energizing spices. Perfect for keto-friendly diets.
instructions: In a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot, cook the bacon over medium heat until crispy, then remove and set aside.
Add the onions to the pot and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, allspice, thyme, cayenne pepper, and black pepper to the pot and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the mushrooms to the pot and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the red chilies to the pot and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the cream cheese, chicken broth, and bacon to the pot, and stir until the cheese is melted and the sauce is creamy.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise the mixture for 20-25 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the keto-friendly barbecue sauce and fresh cilantro.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
